name: backend
description: ``` backend/ ├── models/                 # Mongoose schemas │   ├── Admin.js           # Admin user model with email & password │   ├── PasswordReset.js   # Password reset tokens │   ├── Enquiry.js         # Customer enquiries │   ├── Bill.js            # Invoices & bills │   └── Product.js         # Products catalog │ ├── routes/                 # API endpoints │   ├── auth.js            # Authentication (login, signup, password reset) │   ├── enquiries.js       # Enquiry CRUD operations │   ├── bills.js           # Bill/Invoice management │   ├── products.js        # Product management │   └── dashboard.js       # Admin dashboard stats │ ├── middleware/             # Express middleware │   └── authMiddleware.js  # JWT authentication & authorization │ ├── controllers/            # Business logic (optional - for future expansion) │   └── (placeholder) │ └── server.js              # Express app & server setup
